argv: cf="$1"; d=$(dirname "$cf"); binds=(--bind /shared); case "$d" in "$HOME"/*|/tmp|/tmp/*) ;; *) mkdir -p "$d" 2>/dev/null && binds+=(--bind "$d") ;; esac; exec apptainer exec "${binds[@]}" /shared/projects/tp_2630_ubordeaux_neuromics_184418/containers/marius/spatialbrain.sif python -m ipykernel_launcher -f "$cf"
